name: Local Cost and Throughput Review for {target}
description: Review local call sites, loops, and task boundaries for safe throughput gains using only repository evidence.
prompt_template:
Analyze the local {target} engine for safe throughput and cost improvements using only the repository.

Read:
- engines/{target}/src/*.py
- engines/{target}/tests/
- shared/llm/**/*.py if referenced by the engine
- relevant scripts that invoke the engine

Focus on bounded, local improvements:
- avoid repeated work
- better batching or caching opportunities already supported by the codebase
- unnecessary serial steps
- redundant validation or repeated scans

Do not propose new product features, new orchestration systems, or internet-dependent tools. Action items must be implementable by a later low-authority worker.
